title: CyberneticAssignment
description: Runtime identity, policy, telemetry, relation, and control semantics assigned after image selection and node binding.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

nodeRef.description: URN reference to the node receiving this runtime assignment.

principalRef.description: Optional URN reference to the active runtime principal or DID-backed identity.

controlProfileRef.description: Optional URN reference to the higher-order control profile applied to the node.

serviceIdentity.description: OpenTelemetry-style service identity assigned at runtime.

deploymentEnvironmentName.description: Deployment environment name for runtime identity projection, such as production or staging.

policyRefs.description: Policy references constraining runtime behavior and authorization.

relations.description: Graph edges binding the node into the runtime control system.

reports_to.description: Targets to which this node or runtime reports.

observes.description: Signals or entities observed by this runtime.

acts_on.description: Targets or workflows acted on by this runtime.

governed_by.description: Governance or policy targets controlling this runtime.

objectives.description: Optional objective set for the runtime control loop.

target.description: Human-readable target expression for the objective.
